task1.title: The number of immigrants to three countries from 1990 to 2001
task1.instruction: The graph below shows the number of immigrants to three countries from 1990 to 2001. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Some believe that economic progress is the only way to measure a country's success, while others believe that other factors can be used to measure a country's success. What are these factors? Which factors do you consider most important?
